【便利なキーボードショートカット】（2/2）

　・マグを開く：[F4]キー、[Y]キー

　・カメラの遠近：[+]キー / [-]キー
　・カメラの上下：[/]キー / [*]キー

　・ロビーアクション実行：[Alt]+[A]～[Z]キー
>で ON/OFF できます）
・ダイレクトチャット切り替え：<yellow>[ScrollLock]キー<c>

【チャット入力時の文字列代入コマンド】（1/2）

　・me
　　自分のキャラクター名を代入。

　・target または t
　　現在ターゲット中の人や物の名前を代入。

　・weapon または wp
　　現在装備中の武器の名前を代入。
スト中以外は使用できません）

【特別な状況でのみ使用できる文字列代入コマンド】

　・basecolor または bc
　　採掘基地防衛戦にて一番近い拠点の色を代入。
>[H]キー<c>

【ウィンドウモードの便利な操作】（1/2）

　・リスト表示中にページ単位で進める・戻す
　　[PageDown]キー / [PageUp]キー

　・アイテムを複数選択してまとめて操作
　　[Ctrl]+クリックで単体追加、
　　[Shift]+クリックで範囲追加

　・タブの切り替え
　　[Ctrl]+[PageUp]キー / [Ctrl]+[PageDown]キー
られます。

[PSO2 Player's Site]

-You can find more information about the controls and the world of
Phantasy Star Online 2 at the site below.

Phantasy Star Online 2 Player's Site
<&URL pso2_players_manual>

This site will also feature notices about future updates and events,
so be sure to check in regularly!

The following pages will outline useful game features.

[Useful Keyboard Shortcuts Pt. 1]

Note: All keys listed are from the default settings.

-Open Main Menu: [F1], [Home], [Esc]

-Open Quick Menu: [F9], [End]

-Open Item List: [F2], [I]

-Open Weapon List: [F5], [U] (Customize)
-Open Armor List: [F6], [U] (Customize)

[Useful Keyboard Shortcuts Pt. 2]

-Open Mag List: [F4], [Y]

-Camera Zoom: [+] / [-]
-Camera Up/Down: [/]/[*]

-Use Emote: [Alt]+[A]~[Z]

out
pressing <%ChatStart>.
(You can turn this mode ON/OFF with [ScrollLock])

[Useful Log Window Features]

-Scroll Backlog: [PageUp]/[PageDown]
(Available to use mid-action)

-Switch Channel View: [Ctrl]+[←] or [→]

-Switch Chat Destination: [Alt]+[←] or [→]

-Chat Entry History: [Ctrl]+[↑] or [↓]

-Switch to Direct Chat Mode: [ScrollLock]
e of the weapon you currently have equipped.

[Chat Inserts Pt. 2]

-photonarts or pa
Inserts the name of the Photon Art you just used.

-technique or tc
Inserts the name of the Technique you just used.

-pos
Inserts your current map coordinates.
(Can only be used during quests)

[Special Chat Inserts Available Under Certain Conditions]

-basecolor or bc
Inserts the color of the nearest base during Mining Base Defense Ops.

[Useful Battle Controls]

-Weapon Palette (equipped weapon) Swap
[R]/[F]

-Sub-Palette Left/Right Selection & Use
[G]/[H] to select and [B] to use.

-Switching Sub-Palettes
While swapping Weapon Palettes as shown above, press [G]/[H].

bs
[Ctrl] + [PageUp]/[Ctrl] + [PageDown]

[Useful Controls for Windowed Mode Pt. 2]

-Use scroll wheel to change tabs.

-Use scroll wheel on entry fields for things like price to increase/decrease the value of a given digit.

-Jump to [Buy]/[Sell] on a shop list by using <%NextWidget>

-If you use a mouse with side buttons, you can map up to two functions to them
from the options menu.
